questionText: Select the applications of your organization's consumption of fuel.
questionKo: 귀사에 해당하는 연료 소비 유형을 선택하십시오.
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: Scope 1 greenhouse gas emissions are directly associated with the consumption of fuel. This question provides data users with more transparency regarding the application of an organization's fuel consumption for the generation of secondary energy carriers.

rows.title: Consumption of fuel for the generation of electricity
rows.titleKo: Consumption of fuel 에 대한 generation of electricity

rows.title: Consumption of fuel for the generation of heat
rows.titleKo: Consumption of fuel 에 대한 generation of heat

rows.title: Consumption of fuel for the generation of steam
rows.titleKo: Consumption of fuel 에 대한 generation of steam

rows.title: Consumption of fuel for the generation of cooling
rows.titleKo: Consumption of fuel 에 대한 generation of cooling

rows.title: Consumption of fuel for co-generation or tri-generation
rows.titleKo: Consumption of fuel for co-generation 또는 tri-generation

columns.text: Indicate whether your organization undertakes this fuel application

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Consumption of fuel (excluding feedstocks)" in response to 7.30. Each option that you select in this table will appear as an additional column in 7.30.7.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Consumption of fuel (제외 feedstocks)" in response to 7.30. Each option that you select in this table will appear as an additional 열 in 7.30.7.

guidance.text:
General 
Information you provide should be for the reporting year only (as defined by your answer to 1.4).
This question drives the columns presented in question 7.30.7.
Organizations who consume fuel for any applications not listed such as transportation, industrial process plant and equipment etc. should select ‘Consumption of fuel for the generation of heat'.
It does not matter whether your organization consumes or exports the electricity, steam, or cooling generated; if your organization generates any electricity, steam, or cooling from fuel combustion (thermal generation), then you should select ‘Yes' in the relevant field.
Co-generation is also known as combined heat and power (CHP). Tri-generation is also known as combined cooling, heat and power (CCHP). Combined cooling and power (CCP) is another system in which energy carriers are generated together. If your organization generates from any single configuration of plant in which electricity, steam, heat, or cooling are generated as simultaneous useful outputs, then you should select ‘Yes' for the consumption of fuel for co-generation or tri-generation.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Information you provide 해야 합니다 be 에 대한 보고연도 only (as defined by your answer to 1.4). This 문항 drives the 열 presented in 문항 7.30.7. Organizations who consume fuel for 하나 이상 applications not listed such as transportation, industrial 프로세스 plant 및 equipment etc. 해야 합니다 select ‘Consumption of fuel 에 대한 generation of heat'. It does not matter whether 귀사 consumes 또는 exports the electricity, steam, 또는 cooling generated; 만약 귀사 generates 하나 이상 electricity, steam, 또는 cooling from fuel combustion (thermal generation), then you 해야 합니다 select ‘예' in the 관련 field. Co-generation is also known as combined heat 및 power (CHP). Tri-generation is also known as combined cooling, heat 및 power (CCHP). Combined cooling 및 power (CCP) is another system in which energy carriers are generated together. 만약 귀사 generates from 하나 이상 single configuration of plant in which electricity, steam, heat, 또는 cooling are generated as simultaneous useful outputs, then you 해야 합니다 select ‘예' 에 대한 consumption of fuel for co-generation 또는 tri-generation.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 5/5 points is available for this question.

change.question_ko: 귀사 에서 수행한 연료 소비 관련 활동을 선택하십시오 . ` M7. Environmental Performance - Climate Change 활동 보고 연도에 귀 조직이 이 에너지 관련 활동을 수행했는지 여부를 표시하십시오 . 전기 발생을 위한 연료 소비 예 아니오 열 발생을 위한 연료 소비 스팀 발생을 위한 연료 소비 냉각 발생을 위한 연료 소비 열병합 발전 혹은 삼중 발전 발생을 위한 연료 소비

sectorTagsKo: 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, Food, beverage & tobacco, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: Scope 1 온실가스 배출량 are directly associated with the consumption of fuel. This 문항 provides 데이터 사용자 with more transparency regarding the application of an 조직의 연료 소비량 에 대한 generation of secondary energy carriers.
